steps.title: Welcome Screen
steps.description: A modal that welcomes the user to the platform.

steps.title: Complete Profile
steps.description: Prompt the user to add an avatar and a short bio.

steps.title: Choose Interests
steps.description: Ask the user to select topics like "ICAG" or "CITG".

steps.title: Follow a Tutor
steps.description: Suggest following a few popular instructors.
